## This business cannot transact. Period.

Every "Get It Now" button on the landing page links to `#buy`, which doesn't exist on the page. There is no anchor, no modal, no redirect — nothing happens. A visitor who clicks to purchase gets silently scrolled to nothing.

**What actually exists:**
- A `BUSINESS-PLAN.md` that references Gumroad as the delivery mechanism
- Zero Gumroad account configured
- Zero payment processing of any kind
- No product delivery emails, no download links, no fulfillment pipeline
- The free guide's email capture form replaces itself with `"✓ Check your email for the free guide!"` but stores no emails and sends nothing — there is no email service connected

**What this means:**
- 100% of paying traffic is wasted the instant someone clicks "Get It Now"
- The business has zero path to revenue despite being a revenue-generating product business
- The BUSINESS-PLAN.md projects $50-150 in Month 1 from 500 visitors at 1% conversion — this is fiction. There is no conversion path.
- Even the free guide funnel is broken: users give their email, see a fake success message, and receive nothing. This is deceptive UX.

**Fix:** This needs Gumroad (or Lemon Squeezy, Stripe Checkout, etc.) integration with actual product listings, checkout links, and automated delivery. The email form needs a real backend (Mailchimp, ConvertKit, Buttondown, or even a simple webhook to a Google Sheet). Nothing else on this site matters until this is resolved.

**Why this is #1:** You can have the world's best copy, design, and SEO — if the cash register doesn't open, you don't have a business. You have a portfolio piece.
